name: cosmopolitan_identity
description: Measures the degree to which respondents identify as citizens of the world rather than exclusively as nationals, capturing openness to global belonging over narrow nationalism.

name: transnational_connectedness
description: Captures the extent of respondents' personal ties and direct experiences crossing national borders, including travel, residence abroad, relationships with foreigners, and communication with people living abroad.

name: cultural_openness
description: Measures receptivity to foreign cultures, media, and consumption practices, reflecting how willing respondents are to engage with non-Mexican cultural products and ideas in everyday life.

name: national_cultural_pride
description: Assesses the strength of pride respondents feel toward specific Mexican cultural symbols, traditions, and social characteristics, distinguishing dimensions of national identity rooted in culture.

name: global_governance_support
description: Measures the degree to which respondents support international institutions, multilateral cooperation, and supranational authority in addressing global problems, trade, human rights, and security.
